name: Carrot Muffins (No Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until combined.
3. Spray a 12-cup muffin tin with Pam cooking spray.
4. Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
7. Makes 12 muffins, which equals two servings of six (6) muffins each.
8. For each serving: 1 Bread, 1 Fruit, 1 Milk, 1 Protein, and 3/4 Vegetable.
Note: You can substitute Egg Beaters for the eggs and use Equal instead of Sweet 'n Low sweetener. These muffins freeze well.
